title: The Saint's Magic Power is Omnipotent
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12) + S2 (12) = 24. Adapted from Yuka Tachibana's light novel; the manga comic (Fujiazuki, id 101503) is used here as the chapter source since it tracks episode content more granularly than the light novel's volume structure. Manga ongoing (11 volumes, approx. ch. 47 as of Feb 2026). S1 covers manga Vol. 1-6 (ch. 1-27), ending with the Klausner Domain arc. S2 continues into Vol. 7 onward; the manga's release pace lags the anime (which is novel-based), so the S2 chapter boundary is approximate and the tail may not yet fully cover S2's ending content.

mappings.arc: Season 1: Saint Summoning to the Klausner Domain
